# Debt-to-Income Ratio Calculator -- Free Tool [2026] -- DTI Ratio
> Calculate your debt-to-income ratio instantly. See how DTI affects mortgage approval, credit, and bankruptcy eligibility. Free 2026 calculator.

## About
debttoincomeratio.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- When High DTI Means You Should Consider Bankruptcy -- DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/bankruptcy-signal.html
- Free DTI Calculator -- Calculate Your Debt-to-Income Ratio -- DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/calculator.html
- How Credit Card Debt Drives Up Your DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/credit-card-debt.html
- Debt-to-Income Ratio FAQ -- Common Questions Answered -- DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/faq.html
- How to Lower Your Debt-to-Income Ratio -- 10 Strategies -- DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/how-to-lower.html
- Debt-to-Income Ratio Calculator -- Free Tool [2026] -- DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/
- DTI Ratio and the Bankruptcy Means Test -- How They Connect: https://debttoincomeratio.org/means-test.html
- DTI Requirements for Mortgages -- FHA, Conventional, VA, USDA -- DTI Ratio: https://debttoincomeratio.org/mortgage.html
- Student Loan Impact on DTI Ratio -- IBR, PAYE, SAVE Plans: https://debttoincomeratio.org/student-loans.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
